title: URAファイナルズ予選の後に

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Congratulations on getting through the
preliminaries!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
I was on the edge of my seat. It was so amazing, I
could hardly believe it was a preliminary!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Next up is the semifinals, where all the other
heavy hitters from today will battle it out. I
expect the competition will be steep.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Good to hear! You two keep raising the bar with
every run!
